- Deskripsi Visual: A young person stands outdoors holding a yellow metal railing, with a gray building and windows in the background.

Main Subject:
A young person with short dark hair faces the camera and grips a vertical section of a bright yellow railing with one hand. Their body is turned slightly to the side, and they look forward with a neutral expression. They wear a sleeveless white top with a loose, draped appearance and dark pants with light vertical stripes near the sides. A light-colored strap or looped fabric is visible over one shoulder and around the back.

Setting:
The scene appears to be outside in front of a gray multi-window building. Several window panes with dark grid lines are visible behind the subject, along with boxy outdoor units mounted on the wall. Lighting suggests daytime, and there are green plants or grass at the bottom edge of the frame.

Visual Details:
The composition is centered on the person, framed by the yellow railings on the left side. The railings form diagonal and vertical lines, creating a geometric foreground. The building behind them is muted gray with large rectangular windows. Small round outdoor fixtures are mounted on the wall beneath the windows. The camera angle is slightly low and close, emphasizing the railings and the subject’s upper body and face.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person standing near a yellow railing outdoors, looking toward the camera. A gray building with multiple windows and mounted outdoor equipment fills the background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
